## Checklist

- [ ] There is a related issue (for anything beyond a trivial fix)
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` all pass
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `manifest.json`, `package.json`, and `versions.json` version numbers are unchanged (releases are cut separately, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#releases))
